title: Asker Mod
description: Minecraft Fabric mod which adds a new command with you can ask ChatGPT questions.
body:
This **Minecraft Fabric mod** introduces an exciting new feature that allows players to directly **interact with ChatGPT** through a simple in-game command. Once installed, players can use the **/ask <question>** command to send any question to ChatGPT, and the AI will respond right inside the Minecraft chat. Whether you’re looking for gameplay tips, creative building ideas, survival strategies, or just some fun conversation, this mod seamlessly connects your Minecraft world with the intelligence of ChatGPT.

The mod is built using the **Fabric API**, ensuring lightweight performance and full compatibility with modern Minecraft versions. It communicates securely with the OpenAI API to deliver fast, context-aware answers without interrupting gameplay. Developers and server owners can easily configure API settings, chat formatting, and response behavior to fit their needs.

Perfect for **single-player and multiplayer** environments, the mod adds a unique layer of interactivity, blending AI creativity with the endless possibilities of Minecraft. Whether you’re building, exploring, or experimenting, you can now bring ChatGPT into your world as a helpful assistant or witty companion — all through one simple command. This mod transforms communication in Minecraft, making every session more dynamic, informative, and entertaining.
